text.message: you barely have any brick in your pick now
you don't even get expansion spots now
all you have to do is block teh 10 or 9 and you shut down his game completely
blue has to compete for ows
blue u have to compete for it
i think that 9-10-11 placement is the worst placement i've seen in a long time
see red? look how blockable you are
you just go wheat port and you dominate
instead you took a trash setup for no reason because of an 11 brick lol
sorry you didn't get the expand you wanted
i can solo you too.  lol
lol, i didn't even plow a port or anything, just took a decent spot.  jeez
for you, yes.  ha ha.  i getit
you lose your best expand in the middle of the map and are sad
which is why i thought there's no way that's taken
blue if he didnt take i would have taken 9-10-11 man.. chill
i thought my setup is horrible?
red, think about your thought process. you took worse sheep, and worse wheat, for an 11 brick, that has no expansion spots
you really want to hear my thought process?
can type it out if you want
i have sheep to trade u blue
but u got to help too
on my turn i was throwing 3 cards
look blue, now you got sheep!  happy?
throw the game to black then
i guess your crap trade offers made me not want to give you a city 1 for 1
how am i throwing the game to black?
you missed your window to do a very fair sheep for ore trade
if you just made the trade last turn you would have had a city
i don't understand robbing a dead player there
was goin for ore or wood
i'll keep doing it if you keep robbing me as a dead player
not sure why you're dead.  especially with the 4 rollin
you gonna stop the soloing blue?
sorry red if i owe oj a nb i can't not solo you
if you're gunna keep robbing me
and i didn't even solo you.
you gonna cut it out or no?
now you see you are at 4 and have a city
i gotta get army and pull 2 vps to win
when is it ok to rob you, according to our truce?
red as a sign of good faith
here is a non solo block
black i have a city should i take it?
or do you want to trade
feel free to fish the games over
black didn't even want a card.  weird game this one
managed to get soloed by everyone :)
not sure who it is now...
ok, gonna mute you blue.  take care
i need to 3-1 the rest of my ore to do it
dude you're trying to get rich off of board balance
i have to pop to keep army
with wood port game is over anyway
if you can port we can get an extra turn ehre i think
